description: Failure taxonomy for report/dashboard migrations that succeed technically but fail business expectations.

categories.name: Definition Drift
categories.description: Same label, different metric definition or denominator/numerator.

categories.name: Filter Drift
categories.description: Scope changes due to filter operator or logic updates.
signals: Record type or stage scope changes

categories.name: Time Drift
categories.description: Date logic shifts that alter reporting windows or fiscal mappings.

categories.name: Population Drift
categories.description: Report type or join population shifts (e.g., Lead vs Contact model).

categories.name: Data Truncation / Limits
categories.description: Silent truncation from summary/matrix limits or row limits.

categories.name: Trust & UX Drift
categories.description: Visual parity preserved but key breakdowns or KPIs missing.
